allow: PowerShell($url=$null; for\($i=0;$i -lt 25;$i++\){ Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1500; $m = Select-String -Path "c:\\Users\\Rohan\\Desktop\\Options Extractor\\deploy_tunnel.err","c:\\Users\\Rohan\\Desktop\\Options Extractor\\deploy_tunnel.log" -Pattern "https://[a-z0-9-]+\\.trycloudflare\\.com" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if\($m\){ $url=$m.Matches[0].Value; break } }; if\($url\){ "URL: $url" } else { "no URL yet" })
